creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Is there a problem with the bug-followup address?

I send this morning a followup (for PR 137460) got already 
response from the maintainer but the mails to followup are 
missing at the web interface.

Is there a list like freebsd-bugs where to have a overview 
for mails send to followup?


Regards,
olli hauer
